new-potatoes-with-parmesan-black-pepper-.name: New Potatoes With Parmesan, Black Pepper, And Gribiche Dressing

ingredients.item: New or other small waxy potatoes

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Drizzle potatoes with oil on a large rimmed baking sheet and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper. Roast, tossing once, until golden brown and tender, 20–25 minutes. Remove potatoes from oven and scatter half of Parmesan over top. Roast until cheese is melted, about 1 minute. Remove from oven and toss just to evenly coat potatoes.
Transfer potatoes to a platter and top with remaining Parmesan; season with pepper. Spoon dressing over top.

no-churn-labneh-and-lime-ice-cream-with-.name: No-churn Labneh And Lime Ice Cream With Granola

ingredients.item: Labneh (lebanese strained yogurt) or 1 cup plain whole-milk greek yogurt

instructions: If using Greek yogurt, set a fine-mesh sieve over a bowl; line with cheesecloth. Place yogurt in sieve and let drain in refrigerator 4 hours (you should have ½ cup); discard drained liquid in bowl.
Pulse granola in a food processor to break up a bit. (Or roll up in a kitchen towel and gently crush with a rolling pin.)
Whisk labneh (or strained yogurt), condensed milk, lime zest and juice, and salt in a medium bowl until smooth.
Using an electric mixer, beat cream in a medium bowl, starting on low speed and gradually increasing to medium-high as it thickens, until billowy and stiff peaks form, about 4 minutes.

Add a dollop of whipped cream to labneh mixture and mix in with a rubber spatula (this is just to lighten it so that the next stage—folding—is easier). Add remaining whipped cream and fold in, running spatula down sides and along bottom of bowl, then lifting up through center and over top while rotating bowl to integrate without deflating, until very few streaks of labneh mixture remain.
Fold in granola; scrape ice cream base into a loaf pan that’s at least 8½x4½". Cover with plastic wrap or an airtight silicone lid and freeze until solid, at least 8 hours.
To serve, transfer loaf pan to refrigerator and let ice cream soften 10 minutes before scooping into bowls.

noodles-with-chicken-and-mushrooms-telec.name: Noodles With Chicken And Mushrooms

ingredients.item: 200 g  cogumelos marron ou brancos laminados

instructions: Lay a string of olive oil and butter on a pot, take it to the fire, add the chopped onion and garlic and let it saute. Then add the chicken cut into cubes and let it saute until it is slightly golden.
Adicione depois os cogumelos e tempere com sal e pimenta. Deixe cozinhar por mais 3 minutos. Junte as natas, envolva tudo muito bem, retifique os temperos e retire do lume.

Cook the noodle in abundant water, seasoned with salt and a thread of olive oil, according to the indications of the packaging. Drain and wrap with the chicken. If necessary, you can add some of the cooking water. Serve right away.

nutella-and-strawberry-crepes-pequerecet.name: Nutella And Strawberry Crepes

ingredients.item: Sunflower oil or butter for frying
8 cucharadas de nutella o crema de avellanas y cacao

instructions: We bat both eggs till they are sparkling and then we add milk. We have to reserve the mix.

Then we mix well the dry ingredients (flour, sugar and salt) into another bowl and we add the egg and milk mixture. Finally, we add the melted butter to the dough. If you get the impression that the mass's too thick, add some water. The dough for crepes should be relatively clear. Then we leave to stand for about 30 minutes. If you have no time or have no desire to wait, you can also use mass directly, but this will help get more thin and elastic crepes
While the dough remains, we wash the strawberries well, we remove their stem and cut them into small pieces or sheets as best.

We heat up some oil or butter in an anti-stick frying pan, frying frying pan or electric crepera. Let's sew the dough with a tablespoon from the centre of the frying pan and distribute evenly into a thin cape, tilting and turning frying frying pan.
After about 20- 30 seconds, we turn around and cook across. It's just necessary to grease the frying pan before first crepe.

The ready crepes can be easily stacked onto each other. That has the advantage that those at the bottom stay hot and at the perfect temperature till you have finished using all the dough and cook all the crepes.

Warm up Nutella in a bowl at low power. We put every crepe with a tablespoon of Nutella or cocoa and hazelnuts cream. Then we add strawberries above them, we double the crepes (for example, as a triangle or coils) and Voilà! Your delicious nutella and strawberries are ready!
